query:
SELECT EXISTS(
            SELECT 1 FROM v2_job_queue q
            JOIN v2_job j ON j.id = q.id
            WHERE q.workspace_id = $1
              AND j.runnable_path = $2
              AND j.parent_job IS NULL
              AND j.kind IN ('script', 'preview')
              AND (q.running = true OR q.scheduled_for <= now())
        ) AS "in_flight!"
